title: Binning Numeric Data for Clearer Business Charts
summary: Raw continuous values clutter charts. Bins turn amounts and ages into readable categories.

content.summary: Raw continuous values clutter charts. Bins turn amounts and ages into readable categories.

body.text: Revenue per deal as 500 unique bars helps nobody; binned ranges tell a distribution story. Use business thresholds—deal size buckets, tenure bands—when they exist. Otherwise equal-width bins on filtered numeric columns reveal concentration and tail behavior.

body.alt: Charts and graphs for business reporting
body.caption: Charts and graphs for business reporting. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: Use business thresholds—deal size buckets, tenure bands—when they exist.
Otherwise equal-width bins on filtered numeric columns reveal concentration and tail behavior.

items: Label bins with clear ranges, not cryptic indices.
Avoid too many bins that look like noise.
Re-bin when currency scale changes materially.

body.text: Pipeline reviews filter deals in top bin only. Support teams focus on ticket duration bins above SLA.
Saved filters on bin thresholds survive weekly re-uploads.
Datilio bar charts on binned fields make distributions legible for business users.

meta_description: Raw continuous values clutter charts. Bins turn amounts and ages into readable categories.
